tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a UTF-8 text file from the session workdir.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write a bounded UTF-8 text file inside the session workdir.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search files beneath the session workdir and return path matches.

tools.name: terminal
tools.description: Run a bounded shell command in the session workdir.

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Return concise git working tree status for the session workdir.

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Return a git diff from the session workdir.

tools.name: patch
tools.description: Apply a bounded multi-file patch and report a unified diff.

tools.name: spawn_subagent
tools.description: Queue one Rust-owned delegated subagent request through the brain action contract.

tools.name: fan_out_subagents
tools.description: Queue a bounded Rust-owned fan-out group of delegated subagent requests.

tools.name: scout_codebase
tools.description: Delegate a read-only codebase scouting task and request concise evidence back.

tools.name: summarize_files
tools.description: Delegate read-only file summarization for bounded context gathering.

tools.name: find_relevant_paths
tools.description: Delegate read-only codebase search for paths relevant to a task or question.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the public web through the configured provider and return bounded results.

tools.name: web_extract
tools.description: Fetch and extract bounded text from a public HTTP(S) URL with SSRF guardrails.

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate the session-scoped browser to an allowed public HTTP(S) page.

tools.name: browser_snapshot
tools.description: Return a bounded accessibility snapshot for the session-scoped browser page.

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click a ref from the current session-scoped browser snapshot.

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type bounded text into a ref from the current session-scoped browser snapshot.

tools.name: browser_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the current session-scoped browser page or a snapshot ref.

tools.name: browser_back
tools.description: Navigate back within the current session-scoped browser history.

tools.name: browser_press
tools.description: Send a bounded keyboard press to the current session-scoped browser page.

tools.name: browser_console
tools.description: Read the bounded console log ring for the current session-scoped browser page.

tools.name: browser_vision
tools.description: Capture a screenshot artifact reference for the current session-scoped browser page.

tools.name: den_memory_recall
tools.description: Recall relevant Den-owned memory summaries for the current profile or work context.

tools.name: den_memory_read
tools.description: Read a specific Den-owned memory entry by stable reference.

tools.name: den_memory_search
tools.description: Search Den-owned memories through the configured Den Memories service.

tools.name: den_memory_store
tools.description: Store a new Den-owned memory through the configured Den Memories service.

tools.name: den_memory_propose
tools.description: Propose a Den-owned memory change for later review or acceptance.

tools.name: dense_profile_memory
tools.description: Read or update Rusty Crew dense profile memory through runtime-owned APIs.

tools.name: memory_space_catalog
tools.description: List Rusty Crew runtime-owned memory spaces without reading Den memory.

tools.name: memory_space_read
tools.description: Read supported Rusty Crew memory-space records through bounded read-only runtime APIs.

tools.name: skills_list
tools.description: List configured skills visible to the current profile.

tools.name: skill_view
tools.description: View one configured skill by slug without exposing unrelated files.

tools.name: skill_manage
tools.description: Create, patch, replace, or retire configured skills with governance safeguards.

tools.name: todo
tools.description: Read or update bounded session-local planning todos without changing Den tasks.

tools.name: session_search
tools.description: Search Rusty Crew runtime history through typed search APIs.

tools.name: storage_query_catalog
tools.description: List curated read-only Rusty Crew storage queries without exposing raw SQL.

tools.name: storage_query_execute
tools.description: Execute one curated read-only Rusty Crew storage query by id; raw SQL is not supported.

tools.name: channel_readback
tools.description: Inspect bounded channel context for the current runtime binding without replaying messages.

tools.name: counter_reset
tools.description: Reset or rebuild derived runtime counters without deleting runtime facts.

tools.name: curator_execute
tools.description: Request a narrow audited curator/governance action through control APIs.
